best_rules_serialized.name: Oberste_Gerichtshof
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the Supreme Court of Austria in nominative or genitive case.

best_rules_serialized.name: Oberlandesgericht_City
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches Regional High Courts with city names, ensuring 'Graz' is included.

best_rules_serialized.name: OGH_Abbreviation
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the abbreviation OGH (Oberster Gerichtshof).

best_rules_serialized.name: Bezirksgericht_Handelsgericht
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches District Courts for Commercial Matters (Handelssachen).

best_rules_serialized.name: Law_Firm_OG_KG_GmbH
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches law firms identified by suffixes OG, KG, or GmbH, allowing for slashes, hyphens, and 'und'/'&' in names, ensuring full name capture including 'GmbH & Co KG'.

best_rules_serialized.name: Law_Firm_Rechtsanwaelte_OG
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches law firms ending in 'Rechtsanwälte OG' with flexible name structures including hyphens and '&' or 'und'.

best_rules_serialized.name: Verfassungsgerichtshof
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the Constitutional Court (Verfassungsgerichtshof) in nominative or genitive case.

best_rules_serialized.name: Bezirksgericht_City_Extended
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches District Courts with city names, including specific missing cities like Ried im Innkreis, Mödling, Floridsdorf, and districts.

best_rules_serialized.name: Landesgericht_City_Extended
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches Regional Courts with city names, ensuring 'St. Pölten', 'Hermagor', 'Leoben', 'Salzburg', 'Graz', 'Wien', 'Linz', 'Innsbruck', 'Klagenfurt', 'Bregenz', 'Feldkirch', 'Leoben', 'Lienz', 'Villach', 'Wels', 'Schwechat', 'Liesing', 'Gmunden', 'Bad Ischl', 'Telfs', 'Neusiedl am See', 'Favoriten', 'Fünfthau', 'Josefstadt', 'Hietzing', 'Ried im Innkreis', 'Krems an der Donau', 'Eisenstadt', 'Korneuburg', 'Laa an der Thaya', 'Wiener Neustadt', 'Steyr' are included.

best_rules_serialized.name: Magistrat_Wien
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the Magistrat der Stadt Wien.

best_rules_serialized.name: Verein_Organisation
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches organizations starting with 'Verein' (Association) capturing the full name.

best_rules_serialized.name: Landesgericht_Strafsachen
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches Regional Courts for Criminal Matters (Landesgericht für Strafsachen).

best_rules_serialized.name: Bezirksgericht_Grieskirchen
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches District Court Grieskirchen specifically.

best_rules_serialized.name: VwGH_Abbreviation
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the abbreviation VwGH (Verwaltungsgerichtshof).

best_rules_serialized.name: PVA_Abbreviation
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the abbreviation PVA (Pensionsversicherungsanstalt).

best_rules_serialized.name: SAK_Abbreviation
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the abbreviation SAK (Schweizer Ausgleichskasse).

best_rules_serialized.name: Schweizer_Ausgleichskasse_SAK
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the full name 'Schweizer Ausgleichskasse SAK' including the abbreviation.

best_rules_serialized.name: Wien_Telekom_Betriebe_GmbH
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the specific entity 'Wien-Telekom Betriebe GmbH'.

best_rules_serialized.name: Gesellschaft_mbh_Specific
best_rules_serialized.description: Specifically matches 'Gesellschaft mbH' (lowercase g) which the generic rule might miss if the name structure is complex, e.g., 'Kress Möbel gesellschaft mbH'.

best_rules_serialized.name: OGK_Abbreviation
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the abbreviation ÖGK (Österreichische Gebietskrankenkasse).

best_rules_serialized.name: Vorarlberger_Gebietskrankenkasse
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches the specific entity 'Vorarlberger Gebietskrankenkasse'.

best_rules_serialized.name: Bezirksgericht_Spittal_Güssing_Schärding
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches District Courts for specific missing cities: Spittal an der Drau, Güssing, Schärding.

best_rules_serialized.name: Landesgericht_Krems
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches Regional Courts for Krems an der Donau.

best_rules_serialized.name: Domain_Organisation
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches organization names ending in .at (e.g., 'Logderfurt-Logistik.at', 'YNKW Elektro.at').

best_rules_serialized.name: Hyphenated_Gesellschaft_mbh
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches hyphenated corporate names ending in 'Gesellschaft mbH' (lowercase), e.g., 'WienTransport Werke -GesmbH'.

best_rules_serialized.name: Bezirksgerichts_Leopoldstadt
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches 'Bezirksgerichts Leopoldstadt' specifically to handle the missing case in the extended city list.

best_rules_serialized.name: Generic_KG_Entity
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches generic corporate entities ending in KG (Kommanditgesellschaft) which were previously missing.

best_rules_serialized.name: Hyphenated_Ampersand_Corporate_Name
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches corporate names where the name and suffix are connected by hyphens, plus signs, or ampersands without spaces (e.g., 'Kallenbach+Knackmuss Elektro GmbH', 'Höllerling&Voegtlin Logistik GmbH', 'See-Telekom Gruppe GmbH').

best_rules_serialized.name: Slash_Separated_Corporate_Name
best_rules_serialized.description: Matches corporate names with slash-separated components (e.g., 'urbanek/lind/schmied/reisch Rechtsanwälte OG').
